mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Get ready to receive benefits you never knew you deserved."

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into my favorite caf, and the barista has the audacity to give me a regular coffee instead of my usual triple-shot, extra foam, half-caff, soy latte with a sprinkle of cinnamon on top. I mean, can you believe the nerve? But instead of causing a scene, I took a deep breath, put on my best entitled smile, and calmly told her, "Sweetheart, I think you may have missed the memo on my coffee order. I wouldn't want to cause a disturbance, but I do expect my beverage to be perfect every time, considering how much I come here and spend my hard-earned cash." Well, let me tell you, the barista looked like she had just seen a ghost. She quickly apologized and insisted on making me a new latte, exactly to my specifications, on the house. And as I sipped on that perfectly crafted concoction, I couldn't help but feel a rush of satisfaction. Ah, the perks of being me-entitled and always getting what I want. It's a tough job, but someone's got to do it.
